title: Crater
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Crater}}
'''''Crater''''' was an [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It attempted to rescue the [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] ''[[Link]]'' when it was disabled but was instead destroyed by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].
